name: End-to-End Onboarding Flow - Integration
description: Simulates a full onboarding session: start, complete all steps, and receive completion certificate.
input: Sequence of API calls: /start with valid UserContext, then /step with 'YES' for 5 steps.
output: StepResponse for each step, CompletionResponse at the end.
success_criteria: Each /step call returns StepResponse until the last step
Final /step call returns CompletionResponse with success message
error_scenarios: ErrorResponse if session is lost mid-way
ErrorResponse if invalid input is provided at any step
